metadata.title: EWA_Summary_Bancapp 1.pdf
metadata.periodEnd: be created in the Oracle system
paragraphs: 1- Any new EWA bill received for the first time through email, distribution set to be created in the Oracle system & link with EWA account number. 2- Electricity, Water and municipality rates have separate GL codes for each one and mentioned also in the distribution set. 3- The bill details will be split into the correct Gl codes which reflect the bills details, for example Building name and flat no.

(EWA bill attached with highlighted in pink). 7- Amount should be as per the bill. 8- VAT expense code to be select as BH_P_OOS 9- Report to be sent after running this process with the details of unbooked bills
with the reason. 10- Report to be taken from oracle to check if any bills missed to post. Already this report is available in Oracle called YKA - EWA Bill Missing Report”
YKA Properties Company Realestate Property Manag Almoayyed Tower General IP
narrativeText: 1- Any new EWA bill received for the first time through email, distribution set to be created in the Oracle system & link with EWA account number. 2- Electricity, Water and municipality rates have separate GL codes for each one and mentioned also in the distribution set. 3- The bill details will be split into the correct Gl codes which reflect the bills details, for example Building name and flat no.

(EWA bill attached with highlighted in pink). 7- Amount should be as per the bill. 8- VAT expense code to be select as BH_P_OOS 9- Report to be sent after running this process with the details of unbooked bills
with the reason. 10- Report to be taken from oracle to check if any bills missed to post. Already this report is available in Oracle called YKA - EWA Bill Missing Report”
YKA Properties Company Realestate Property Manag Almoayyed Tower General IP

- 4- Some bills, having special criteria in the distribution, where the amount divide equally between 2 departments, or taken directly to 1 account (all these details already reflected in the distribution set)
- 5- Bills are issued from Electricity & water Authority & received in one email i.e. Propery@almoayyed.com 6- The Bancapp system needs to book the bills based on the highlighted details

notes: Hybrid mode requested through opendataloader_pdf.convert(..., hybrid='docling-fast'). Forced OCR must be enabled on the hybrid server process itself.
Local OCR fallback was skipped because direct OCR dependencies are not available.
issues: Tesseract OCR binary was not found. Install Tesseract and either add it to PATH or set TESSERACT_CMD to the full tesseract.exe path.
No structured tables found; OCR/layout reconstruction did not produce a confident table.
